name: Okta Developer MCP Server
what_it_does: Okta Developer-focused MCP server for accessing Okta's developer documentation, API references, and integration guides to assist developers building Okta integrations.
use_cases: Accessing Okta integration documentation from code generation agents
Querying Okta API reference for authentication flow implementation
Developer Q&A about Okta SDK integration patterns
not_for: Production Okta management (use okta-mcp for that)
best_when: A developer agent needs to query Okta's technical documentation for integration guidance.
avoid_when: You need production Okta management — use the okta-mcp server.

auth.notes: Documentation access — no authentication required for public docs.

performance.rate_limits: Standard API limits for documentation access

known_agent_gotchas: Documentation-only — cannot perform actual Okta management operations
Docs may lag latest Okta API releases
Use alongside okta-mcp for complete agent-driven Okta integration
agent_readiness.security_notes: No credentials required — public documentation. HTTPS enforced. Okta's infrastructure security is enterprise-grade.

security_score_components.security_notes: No credentials needed. Public documentation. HTTPS enforced. Okta infrastructure security.
